name: Ground Zero
flavorHeadline: Carolina Reaper + Trinidad Moruga Scorpion, charred tomato character
heatDescriptor: Total devastation — for the few who dare
jarImageAlt: Jar of Tomato Warning Ground Zero EF-5 salsa with a near-black label
productStory: The end of the scale. Ground Zero is not a dare — it is a destination for the few who need to know what exists at the edge. Carolina Reaper and Trinidad Moruga Scorpion, two of the hottest cultivated peppers on earth, drive this catastrophic blend as twin engines of organized destruction. A charred tomato base provides the only structure left standing. Total devastation is not the absence of flavor — it is flavor so intense that everything else falls away. 100,000 to 500,000+ SHU. You were warned.
pairings: Chili con carne for the fearless
Hot wings that needed to be hotter
